purpose: Create a permanent one-to-one NAT mapping.
example: R1(config)# ip nat inside source static 192.168.1.10 203.0.113.10

command: ip nat inside source list <acl> interface <if> overload
purpose: Configure PAT (overload) to the outside interface.
example: R1(config)# ip nat inside source list 1 interface g0/0 overload
